text:
In the heart of a bustling city lived Jenny. She had a peculiar pet—the most unlikely companion anyone could imagine—Mr. Sparkles, a talking parrot with a penchant for jazz music. Jenny took great pride in Mr. Sparkles’ eclectic tastes; from swing to salsa.

One rainy afternoon, as raindrops drummed on the windowpane, Jenny sat eagerly listening to a vinyl record of Louis Armstrong. That’s when Mr. Sparkles let out a whistle, more proud than amused. “Hey there!” he squawked in tune.

Jenny looked up, bemused. “What are you doing?”

“Miss me?” Mr. Sparkles quacked excitedly.

“It’s raining. Why?”

Because, with a wise old wisdom only a parrot could muster, Mr. Sparkles was offering rain-proofing. “Wear something shiny!” he chirped.

Jenny giggled. With that, she dived into her drawer to find something shiny. She pulled out
